About

Built on Precision
and Pattern

Thran Capital is a proprietary arbitrage operation focused on identifying and systematically exploiting pricing inefficiencies across secondary markets. We deploy capital where others overlook — finding spread where the market has failed to equalize.


Our approach is methodical, data-driven, and grounded in the conviction that inefficient markets reward those who do the work.

Strategy

How We Operate

01

Market Identification

We scan retail and secondary market venues continuously, identifying assets trading at persistent price discrepancies across platforms and buyer pools.

02

Systematic Execution

Positions are sized and executed with discipline. We prioritize high-conviction opportunities with favorable risk/reward profiles and clear exit pathways.

03

Capital Efficiency

Every dollar is deployed with purpose. We track position-level performance and reinvest proceeds rapidly to maximize the velocity of capital across the portfolio.
